segments.text: Delay and dub effects are the primary tool for space and texture in deep house.
Lay down atmospheric pads as the bed under everything in the arrangement.
Pan layered organic percussion across the stereo field to open up the space.

claims.claim_text: Use delay and dub effects as the primary tool for space and texture.
Lay atmospheric pads as the bed under the arrangement.
Pan layered organic percussion across the stereo field to open the space.
